mapper.select: SELECT f.*, u.username FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT f.*, u.username FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (user_id, content, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{status})
